Prologue: Leave your next foe to me, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. They will make good sport for my training!

Prologue: What is that look, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>? Do you fear for my well-being? Worry not! Our battles together have only just begun.

Epilogue: What is that gaze, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>? Do you fear for my safety? You needn't worry so. Our battles together are far from over!

Prologue: Are you certain this will work? What if I... No, I mustn't think such foolish things. Come, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, let us seek new foes!
